title: RNA-Seq Healthy control sample 2, Alveolar macrophage, Mycobacterium tuberculosis non-challenged library
treatment_protocol_ch1: Bronchoalveolar lavage samples were filtered to remove macro contaminants and alveolar macrophages (AM) cells enrich via tube adhesion method. 1 x 106 AM cells were cultured with media (not challenged) or media + Mtb (challenged) for 20h.
extract_protocol_ch1: Cells were lysed with Trizol and kept at -80°C until extraction.  RNA isolation was performed with miRNeasy kit and RNA integrity (RIN) was assessed with the Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer.
extract_protocol_ch1.1: RNA libraries were prepared for sequencing using standard unstrand Illumina protocols (TruSeq RNA Library Preparation Kit v2, Set A ).
description: Healthy control sample 2, Alveolar macrophage, Mycobacterium tuberculosis non-challenged library
data_processing: Basecalling was done with Illumina Casava 1.8.2 and fastq files generated via bcl2fastq v2.18.
data_processing.1: Fastq files were trimmed to remove leftover adaptor sequences and < phred 20 bases using cutadapt v2.6.
data_processing.2: Read alignment was performed with STAR v2.7.3a and resulting alignments in transcriptomic coordinates was input to Salmon v1.1.0 for gene expression estimation.
data_processing.3: Gene level estimated counts matrix was created in R v3.6.1, using tximport v1.12.3 with the option “lengthScaledTPM”.
data_processing.4: Libray depth and compositional bias scaling factors were calculated via the function calcNormFactors from edgeR v3.26.8 and used by limma’s voom function (v3.40.6) to generate the normalized log2(CPM) expression matrix.
data_processing.6: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited text files including transcript estimated counts and TPM values for each sample.
data_processing.7: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited matrix table with raw estimated gene counts for every gene and sample (lengthScaledTPM).
data_processing.8: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited matrix table with normalized gene expression in log2 scale for tested genes (created with limma's voom function). Covariates not regressed out.

extract_protocol_ch1: Cells were lysed with Trizol and kept at -80°C until extraction.  RNA isolation was performed with miRNeasy kit and RNA integrity (RIN) was assessed with the Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer.
extract_protocol_ch1.1: RNA libraries were prepared for sequencing using standard unstrand Illumina protocols (TruSeq RNA Library Preparation Kit v2, Set A ).
description: Pre-exposure prophylaxis sample 30, Alveolar macrophage, Mycobacterium tuberculosis non-challenged library
data_processing: Basecalling was done with Illumina Casava 1.8.2 and fastq files generated via bcl2fastq v2.18.
data_processing.1: Fastq files were trimmed to remove leftover adaptor sequences and < phred 20 bases using cutadapt v2.6.
data_processing.2: Read alignment was performed with STAR v2.7.3a and resulting alignments in transcriptomic coordinates was input to Salmon v1.1.0 for gene expression estimation.
data_processing.3: Gene level estimated counts matrix was created in R v3.6.1, using tximport v1.12.3 with the option “lengthScaledTPM”.
data_processing.4: Libray depth and compositional bias scaling factors were calculated via the function calcNormFactors from edgeR v3.26.8 and used by limma’s voom function (v3.40.6) to generate the normalized log2(CPM) expression matrix.
data_processing.6: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited text files including transcript estimated counts and TPM values for each sample.
data_processing.7: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited matrix table with raw estimated gene counts for every gene and sample (lengthScaledTPM).
data_processing.8: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited matrix table with normalized gene expression in log2 scale for tested genes (created with limma's voom function). Covariates not regressed out.

extract_protocol_ch1.1: RNA libraries were prepared for sequencing using standard unstrand Illumina protocols (TruSeq RNA Library Preparation Kit v2, Set A ).
description: Person living with HIV sample 11, Alveolar macrophage, Mycobacterium tuberculosis challenged library
data_processing: Basecalling was done with Illumina Casava 1.8.2 and fastq files generated via bcl2fastq v2.18.
data_processing.1: Fastq files were trimmed to remove leftover adaptor sequences and < phred 20 bases using cutadapt v2.6.
data_processing.2: Read alignment was performed with STAR v2.7.3a and resulting alignments in transcriptomic coordinates was input to Salmon v1.1.0 for gene expression estimation.
data_processing.3: Gene level estimated counts matrix was created in R v3.6.1, using tximport v1.12.3 with the option “lengthScaledTPM”.
data_processing.4: Libray depth and compositional bias scaling factors were calculated via the function calcNormFactors from edgeR v3.26.8 and used by limma’s voom function (v3.40.6) to generate the normalized log2(CPM) expression matrix.
data_processing.6: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited text files including transcript estimated counts and TPM values for each sample.
data_processing.7: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited matrix table with raw estimated gene counts for every gene and sample (lengthScaledTPM).
data_processing.8: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited matrix table with normalized gene expression in log2 scale for tested genes (created with limma's voom function). Covariates not regressed out.

data_processing.2: Read alignment was performed with STAR v2.7.3a and resulting alignments in transcriptomic coordinates was input to Salmon v1.1.0 for gene expression estimation.
data_processing.3: Gene level estimated counts matrix was created in R v3.6.1, using tximport v1.12.3 with the option “lengthScaledTPM”.
data_processing.4: Libray depth and compositional bias scaling factors were calculated via the function calcNormFactors from edgeR v3.26.8 and used by limma’s voom function (v3.40.6) to generate the normalized log2(CPM) expression matrix.
data_processing.6: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited text files including transcript estimated counts and TPM values for each sample.
data_processing.7: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited matrix table with raw estimated gene counts for every gene and sample (lengthScaledTPM).
data_processing.8: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited matrix table with normalized gene expression in log2 scale for tested genes (created with limma's voom function). Covariates not regressed out.
